subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We made mention of thee aforetime with that which drew the hearts of the devoted ones in their chambers. Verily, thy Lord is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی انا ذکرناک من قبل بما انجذبت به افئده القانتات فی الغرفات ان ربک هو
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @station of the Manifestation of God
